id: # WORKS.CSV  —  One row per artwork. Each row adds one card to the Works page.
# HOW TO EDIT:  Fill in columns for each piece. Order in this file = order on site.
# IMAGES:       Put image files in the images/ folder. Path example: images/mywork.webp
#               Recommended size: 2000px on the longest side  JPEG or WebP at 80% quality.
# COMMENTS:     Any row whose first cell starts with # is ignored by the site.
# LONG TEXT:    Wrap any cell containing commas or line breaks in double quotes  "like this".
#               To include a literal quote inside a cell  write it as two quotes: ""like this""
#   id          — A unique reference code for yourself (not shown on site). E.g.  001  vl-03
#   title       — Artwork title shown on the card and in the lightbox
#   series      — Series name shown under the title. Must match exactly if grouping.
#   year        — Year created. Shown in the lightbox.
#   material    — Materials used. Shown in the lightbox. E.g.  Polymer clay  resin cast
#   dimensions  — Size of the work. E.g.  40 × 30 × 28 cm
#   description — Optional longer text shown at the bottom of the lightbox. Can be many sentences.
#   image       — Path to the image file. E.g.  images/too_much.webp
#   available   — Availability status shown in lightbox. E.g.  Available  Sold  NFS  On loan

title: Through your eyes
description: “Few, if anyone, will ever see the world Through your eyes”

title: With A Smile
description: “It's all started with a smile, I know, but it won't come back”
